next_steps: Check serum TSH, free T4, and free T3 levels
Obtain serum and CSF NMDAR antibody testing
Obtain a comprehensive toxicological review including heavy metals and thyroid hormone analogues
Perform whole-body CT imaging to screen for occult malignancy (e.g., ovarian teratoma or other neoplasms)
Consider empiric treatment for autoimmune encephalitis (e.g., high-dose corticosteroids or IVIG) if clinical suspicion remains high
Monitor for autonomic instability and manage symptoms supportively in the ICU
